title: Styled Google Slides export
description: Add visual styling to the Google Slides export so it doesn't look like a blank doc. Title slide gets accent-colored background, headings get proper font sizing and weight, code blocks use monospace font, metrics get styled number treatment, proper spacing/alignment throughout. All done via Google Slides API updateTextStyle/updateShapeProperties/updateParagraphStyle requests. Server-side only change — no frontend work.
acceptance_criteria: Exported title slide has colored background and centered large heading
Content slide headings are visually distinct from body text (size, weight, color)
Code slides use monospace font in the code block area
Metrics slides have styled large numbers with accent color
Consistent font family across all slides (not Google Slides default)
Exported slides look polished enough that users only need to add branding/images
notes: NEEDS PLANNING — do not implement until plan is approved by Beckham.
